title: Pest control kit and method
abstract: A pest control kit is provided to aid the control of a population of immature larval stages or pupal insects. The pest control kit comprises an amount of an entomopathogenic nematode and a wetting agent composition, the wetting agent composition comprising: a solvent; and a surfactant. The pest control kit aims to provide a naturally occurring entomopathogenic nematode for biological control of immature larval insects which can act as pests to plants, whether these be for professional plant protection including agricultural, forestry and horticultural or for home garden use. The new pest control product of the present invention aims to prove safe and sustainable protection for turf and plants all year round.
claims: 1. A pest control kit, the pest control kit comprising: a) a predetermined amount of an entomopathogenic nematode; and b) a wetting agent composition comprising dipropylene glycol methyl ether.
